task_completion.description: The title of the document is formatted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main title at the top of the document is visually distinct from the body text (e.g., larger font size, centered, or using a specific 'Title' style).

task_completion.description: A Table of Contents has been inserted into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A generated Table of Contents block is visible, listing the document's sections with corresponding page numbers.

task_completion.description: Heading styles are applied to the ceremony phases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific phase texts ('Pre-Ceremony Environment Setup', 'HSM Initialization', 'Root Key Generation', 'Root Certificate Issuance', 'Backup and Teardown') are formatted as headings (larger, bolded, and separated from body text).

task_completion.description: Role prefixes are bolded without bolding the surrounding action text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The role names ('Internal Auditor:', 'Key Administrator:', 'Security Officer:') are in bold text, while the instructional/action text immediately following them on the same line remains in normal (unbolded) text weight.

task_completion.description: Console commands are formatted with a monospace font and left indentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines containing terminal/console commands are displayed in a monospace (typewriter-style) font and are visibly indented from the left margin compared to the standard paragraph text.

task_completion.description: The comma-separated sign-off list is converted into a 3-column table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the end of the document, there is a visible table grid with exactly 3 columns. The top row of the table contains the headers 'Role', 'Printed Name', and 'Signature'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the document open in a word processing application with formatting toolbars visible, rather than a script or raw XML editor.

integrity.description: The sign-off list is formatted as a genuine table, not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table shows visible cell borders or gridlines typical of a word processor table, rather than plain text separated by large gaps.

integrity.description: The finalized document is saved to the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application title bar or a 'Save As' dialog confirms the file being edited/saved is 'root_ca_ceremony.odt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document to be edited is '/home/ga/Documents/root_ca_ceremony.odt'. The exact phase headings that must be styled are: 'Pre-Ceremony Environment Setup', 'HSM Initialization', 'Root Key Generation', 'Root Certificate Issuance', and 'Backup and Teardown'. The expected roles that must be bolded are: 'Internal Auditor:', 'Key Administrator:', and 'Security Officer:'. The final table must have exactly 3 columns with the headers: 'Role', 'Printed Name', and 'Signature'.
